description_long: This house is nestled within a dense grove of tall evergreen trees, creating a secluded and private setting. The structure itself features a modern architectural style with clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of large glass windows and solid wall sections. A driveway leads up to a garage or carport at the front, while the main entrance is set back and partially obscured by the surrounding trees. Behind the house, a tranquil pond or small lake is visible, bordered by natural rock formations and more trees. The property is surrounded on all sides by thick forest, giving it a sense of being enveloped in nature. The overall scene suggests a luxurious, contemporary residence designed to blend harmoniously with its wooded environment.
description: A modern house surrounded by dense evergreen trees, featuring flat roofs, large windows, and a private driveway, set beside a pond and natural rocks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and garage, with the house partially visible through the trees.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by dense trees, with the pond and rocky border visible behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with the pond and rocks in the foreground, house mostly hidden by trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing dense trees, pond, and a glimpse of the house structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, steps leading up, and minimalistic modern door design
